task: Yes

I need to set up a Fastlane metadata directory structure in my Android app
repository for F-Droid, and copy/convert images from a sibling iOS project.

Project layout:
  ../hackerspub-ios/     ← iOS project (image source)
  ./                    ← Android app repo (current directory)

Package name: [com.example.myapp]
Default locale: en-US

Tasks:

1. SCAN the iOS project for usable assets:
   - Search ../hackerspub-ios/ recursively for:
     * App icons: any file named Icon*.png, AppIcon*.png, icon*.png,
       or inside an *.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/ folder
     * Screenshots: any PNG/JPG inside folders named
       screenshots/, Screenshots/, fastlane/, or *Snapshots*
     * Description text: README.md, fastlane/metadata/ any .txt files
   - Print a full list of found files before doing anything else.
   - STOP and ask me to confirm before proceeding to step 2.

2. CREATE the Fastlane directory structure:
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/changelogs/

3. COPY & CONVERT the app icon:
   - Find the largest resolution icon from the iOS assets (1024x1024
     preferred, from App Store / marketing assets)
   - Copy it to:
     fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/icon.png
   - If it is not already 512x512, resize it to 512x512 using
     ImageMagick (convert) or Python Pillow. Keep aspect ratio.
   - If no suitable icon is found, print a warning and skip.

4. COPY & CONVERT screenshots:
   - Copy all found screenshots to:
     fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/
   - Rename them sequentially: 01.png, 02.png, 03.png ...
   - If screenshots are iPhone-sized (e.g. 1170x2532), note that
     F-Droid accepts them as-is — do not resize.
   - If no screenshots found, print a warning and skip.

5. CREATE text metadata files:
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/title.txt
     → Contents: [My App Name] (max 30 chars
user_feedback_text:

  ../hackerspub-ios/     ← iOS project (image source)
  ./                    ← Android app repo (current directory)

Package name: [com.example.myapp]
Default locale: en-US

Tasks:

1. SCAN the iOS project for usable assets:
   - Search ../hackerspub-ios/ recursively for:
     * App icons: any file named Icon*.png, AppIcon*.png, icon*.png,
       or inside an *.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/ folder
     * Screenshots: any PNG/JPG inside folders named
       screenshots/, Screenshots/, fastlane/, or *Snapshots*
     * Description text: README.md, fastlane/metadata/ any .txt files
   - Print a full list of found files before doing anything else.
   - STOP and ask me to confirm before proceeding to step 2.

2. CREATE the Fastlane directory structure:
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/
   fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/imag
